task: Move the yellow cloth behind the pot with the corn
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A stainless steel pot, a yellow corn, and a yellow cloth are on a wooden countertop. The cloth is positioned to the left of the pot. The pot is a rigid container with a flat base and a circular rim; the cloth is a flexible fabric. STRATEGY - First, reach for the cloth to grasp it. Then, transport it to the right side of the pot. Finally, place it there. Failure modes include dropping the cloth during transport or placing it in an invalid location. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach for the cloth to establish contact. Step 2: Grasp the cloth to lift it. Step 3: Transport the cloth to the right of the pot. Step 4: Place the cloth on the countertop to the right of the pot.

**Goal:** on(yellow_cloth, right_of(pot)); stable(yellow_cloth)
**Scene:** pot, corn, yellow_cloth
**Step 1:** reach(yellow_cloth)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow cloth
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_cloth, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_cloth) < 0.03
**Step 2:** grasp(yellow_cloth)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow cloth
  contact: holding(yellow_cloth) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_cloth)
**Step 3:** transport(yellow_cloth -> right_of(pot))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop to the right of the pot
  spatial: above(yellow_cloth, right_of(pot), 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_cloth)
  done_when: above(yellow_cloth, right_of(pot), 0.05)
**Step 4:** place(yellow_cloth -> right_of(pot))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop to the right of the pot
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_cloth, right_of(pot)) [completion]; released(yellow_cloth) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_cloth) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_cloth, right_of(pot)) AND released(yellow_cloth)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the yellow cloth
the body of the yellow cloth
